---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Dryade
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Is it related to a frustration? (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when...")

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the specific use case this would enable. Who benefits and how?

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples. Links to similar implementations in other projects are welcome.
